tree_size.decision_supported: is the substrate in use at all

distinct_creator_keys.decision_supported: is more than one party signing records (multi-agent ecosystem)

distinct_context_ids.decision_supported: how many distinct sessions/traces use the log

chain_depth.decision_supported: do chains form (the thesis), or is each call standalone

event_type_ratio.decision_supported: are real economic events flowing, or is it all chatter

log_age_days.decision_supported: is the log surviving across redeploys (covered by Tier 0 too; useful for sanity)

top_creator_share.decision_supported: is one signer dominating, or is contribution distributed
